sections.name: Hero Section
sections.content: Welcome to Small Business Expansion Grant. We provide free grant funding for your business with no repayment required.

sections.name: How It Works
sections.content: Apply online in minutes. Get reviewed within 24 hours. Receive funding directly to your account.

sections.name: Application Form
sections.content: Complete the form below to apply for grant funding. Fill in your business details and submit.

sections.name: Track Your Application
sections.content: Enter your Application ID to check the status of your grant application.

sections.name: Contact Information
sections.content: Get in touch with our team for questions about grant programs and application assistance.

sections.name: About the Startup Grant
sections.content: Funding for new businesses looking to get off the ground. Up to $25,000 available.

sections.name: About the Innovation Grant
sections.content: For businesses developing new products, services, or technologies. Up to $100,000 available.

sections.name: About the Community Grant
sections.content: Supporting local businesses that contribute to community development. Up to $15,000 available.
